text:
ByOscar Hartzog

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

Two of the world’s best nationalsoccerteams are set to meet in the men’sOlympicsquarterfinals when host country France clashes with Argentina on Friday.

Where to Stream:Peacock,DirecTV Stream,Discovery+ (UK) with VPNTV Channel:TelemundoDate, Start Time:Friday, Aug. 2, 3 p.m. ET/noon PT

The powerhouse teams are the most recent World Cup winners (Argentina in 2022 and France in 2018), but France hasn’t won an Olympicsoccermedal since 1984 when they took gold. Argentina, on the other hand, won gold in the 2004 and 2008 games.

France cruised through its first two games of the 2024Olympicstournament, beating Team USA, Guinea, and New Zealand without penalty shootouts. Argentina (which is missing starLionel Messi) had a bit more trouble, losing 2-1 to Morocco before beating Iraq and Ukraine in the group stage.

If you’re looking to watch France vs. Argentina online, read on. Below is a quick guide on where to stream the France vs. Argentina quarterfinal without cable, where to watch it on TV, and how to get a France vs. Argentina livestream with aVPN.

In the US, the France vs. Argentina Olympics soccer game is only airing live in Spanish on Telemundo. If you want an English-language broadcast, you can livestream France vs. Argentina onPeacockor Discovery+ (UK version) with aVPN. If you want a Spanish-language broadcast but don’t have cable, you can get the Telemundo stream online through a live TV streamer likeDirecTV Stream. Here’s a further breakdown of these options:

Peacockis offering livestreams of every 2024 Olympics event, making it the best way to watch France vs. Argentina online. The service costs just $7.99 a month but does not come with a free trial.



Peacock offers both live and on-demand content, including sports like WWE, Golf, and Olympics, and series likeThe OfficeandYellowstone. Subscriptions start at $7.99 a month.

If you don’t have cable but want to watch the Spanish-language broadcast of France vs. Argentina on Telemundo, grab afree trial to DirecTV Stream. The cable streaming service includes Telemundo in its extensive offerings, as well as other Olympics channels like NBC and USA Network.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

Another way to watch France vs. Argentina online in English is to get aVPN(virtual private network) and access the UK’s Discovery+ platform. Discovery+ (UK version) is offering streams of every Olympics event, and it’s cheaper than Peacock at £3.99 (a little over $5) a month. If you don’t have a VPN to watch France vs. Argentina on Discovery+, we suggestExpressVPN.



ExpressVPN offers internet access in up to 160 locations around the world, making it easy to tune into local networks to watch live sports coverage online. Plans start at $12.95 a month (but right now you can get three months free when signing up for an annual package). Plus: All your info will be kept secure and private.

The France vs. Argentina Olympics soccer game is happening on Friday, Aug. 2. The match starts at 3 p.m. ET/noon PT.

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How to Watch France vs. Argentina Olympics Soccer Game Online
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch France vs. Argentina during the 2024 Olympics, including where to livestream the France vs. Argentina men’s soccer game online.
